title: Bridge Essay: Attentional and cognitive monitoring brain networks in long-term meditators depe

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Ultimate/Emptiness** (Phase 17) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Ultimate/Emptiness to mechanistic neuroscience through Attentional, and, cognitive, monitoring, brain.

**Attentional and cognitive monitoring brain networks in long-term meditators depend on meditation states and expertise.** — Sci Rep. PMID: 33649378. DOI: 10.1038/s41598-021-84325-3. Meditation practice is suggested to engage training of cognitive control systems in the brain. To evaluate the functional involvement of attentional and cognitive monitoring processes during meditation, the present study analysed the electroencephalographic synchronization of fronto-parietal (FP) and medial-frontal (MF) brain networks in highly experienced meditators during different meditation states (focused attention, open monitoring and loving kindness meditation).
